steps: Launch the app via scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1.
Open Settings and confirm an 'Experimental' entry appears in the sidebar.

Click Experimental and confirm the first element of the panel is a warning banner whose text reads (or whose i18n key resolves to) 'These features are under active development and may change or be removed.'
In Settings -> Experimental, confirm exactly one row is rendered for experimental_simplify_mode.
Confirm the row has a label, a one-line description, and a link to a feedback issue template URL.
Toggle experimental_simplify_mode in the Experimental panel.
Close the app, relaunch via scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1, and re-open Settings -> Experimental.
Confirm the toggle reflects the value chosen before the restart.
Open src/lib/experiments.ts and confirm it exports a readonly array of Experiment objects with the type { id, settingsKey, labelKey, descriptionKey, feedbackUrl }.
Mentally simulate adding a second experiment: confirm the only files that would change are src/lib/experiments.ts and the locale JSON files (no panel-component edit needed).
Launch the app and open Settings.
Confirm a 'Post Process' entry appears in the sidebar (sidebar.postProcessing).
Click it and confirm the PostProcessingSettings panel renders the existing prompt + provider UI.
Run a local OpenAI-compatible loopback server (e.g. lmstudio or vllm at http://localhost:1234/v1).
In Post Process settings, configure provider with that base URL and a placeholder API key; save.
Open a transcript fixture and trigger the cleanup action.
Confirm cleanup completes without error and the transcript reflects cleaned output.
Bonus: configure a non-loopback URL (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1) and confirm the backend rejects the request (managers/cleanup loopback enforcement).
Run: rg -n 'check_apple_intelligence_available|APPLE_INTELLIGENCE_PROVIDER_ID|APPLE_PROVIDER_ID|apple_intelligence|appleIntelligence' src src-tauri
Confirm zero matches outside vendored dependencies / generated bindings / build artifacts.
Hand-edit a settings.json to set the post-processing provider id to 'apple_intelligence'.
Launch the app via scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1.
Open Settings -> Post Process and confirm the provider Select shows the default provider (no Apple Intelligence option, no crash, no console error).
Confirm cleanup still runs against the default provider.

AC-004-b.command: Run i18n-pruning skill across all 20 locale files
